## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:ci`
- [ ] `npm run build:prod`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is small and focused.
- [ ] No unrelated rewrite or mass formatting is included.
- [ ] Angular style guide and local project conventions are followed.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` standards are followed.
- [ ] Component and service responsibilities are clear.
- [ ] Templates are readable and accessible.
- [ ] RxJS subscriptions are safe.
- [ ] Signal usage is intentional and consistent with the current feature.
- [ ] Strict typing is maintained.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated for meaningful behavior changes.
- [ ] Lint passes or remaining warnings are documented.
- [ ] Build passes or remaining issues are documented.
- [ ] Accessibility was considered.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are exposed.
